intents.name: order_status
intents.description: Customer is asking where their order is or when it will arrive.

intents.name: refund_request
intents.description: Customer wants money back for a product or service.

intents.name: cancel_order
intents.description: Customer wants to cancel an order they placed.

intents.name: technical_issue
intents.description: Customer reports a product/app/website not working.

intents.name: billing_question
intents.description: Customer has a question about a charge, invoice, or payment.

intents.name: general_inquiry
intents.description: Anything that does not fit the categories above.

few_shot_examples.message: Where is my parcel? It was due two days ago.
I was charged twice for the same subscription.
The mobile app keeps crashing when I open it.

messages_to_classify: My package never arrived and I want my money back.
Can I stop the order I made an hour ago before it ships?
Hi, just wondering if you ship to Austria.
